patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
index d033b7c2ef4a..2cec256812b0 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
@@ -1144,8 +1144,12 @@ static void addMask(SmallVectorImpl<int> &Mask, ArrayRef<int> SubMask,
       (!ExtendingManyInputs || SubMask.size() > Mask.size() ||
        // Check if input scalars were extended to match the size of other node.
        (SubMask.size() == Mask.size() &&
-        std::all_of(std::next(Mask.begin(), Mask.size() / 2), Mask.end(),
-                    [](int Idx) { return Idx == PoisonMaskElem; }))) &&
+        (std::all_of(std::next(Mask.begin(), Mask.size() / 2), Mask.end(),
+                     [](int Idx) { return Idx == PoisonMaskElem; }) ||
+         // Or mask is a single-input shuffle (all indices < Mask.size()).
+         std::all_of(Mask.begin(), Mask.end(),
+                     [&](int Idx) { return Idx == PoisonMaskElem ||
+                                          Idx < static_cast<int>(Mask.size()); })))) &&
       "SubMask with many inputs support must be larger than the mask.");
   if (Mask.empty()) {
     Mask.append(SubMask.begin(), SubMask.end());
test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
index d033b7c2ef4a..2cec256812b0 100644

@@ -1144,8 +1144,12 @@ static void addMask(SmallVectorImpl<int> &Mask, ArrayRef<int> SubMask,
       (!ExtendingManyInputs || SubMask.size() > Mask.size() ||
        // Check if input scalars were extended to match the size of other node.
        (SubMask.size() == Mask.size() &&
-        std::all_of(std::next(Mask.begin(), Mask.size() / 2), Mask.end(),
-                    [](int Idx) { return Idx == PoisonMaskElem; }))) &&
+        (std::all_of(std::next(Mask.begin(), Mask.size() / 2), Mask.end(),
+                     [](int Idx) { return Idx == PoisonMaskElem; }) ||
+         // Or mask is a single-input shuffle (all indices < Mask.size()).
+         std::all_of(Mask.begin(), Mask.end(),
+                     [&](int Idx) { return Idx == PoisonMaskElem ||
+                                          Idx < static_cast<int>(Mask.size()); })))) &&
       "SubMask with many inputs support must be larger than the mask.");
   if (Mask.empty()) {
     Mask.append(SubMask.begin(), SubMask.end());
